revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == This infobox is intended to be used on [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] description/documentation pages. {{Parameter names example | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} == Full syntax == {{infobox Wikipedia user script |styled = |bodystyle = |install-target = |name = |logo = |logosize = |logoupright = |logoalt = |logo-caption = |screenshot = |screenshotsize = |screenshotupright = |screenshotalt = |screenshot-caption = |desc = |author = |maintainer = |status = |released = |version = |updated = |browsers = |skins = |source = |github = |categorize = }} == Example == {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[Firefox]], [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[Firefox]], [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} * Add |styled = yes for an alternate colored version (see second example): {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[Firefox]], [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | status = Stable | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[Firefox]], [[Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} == Parameters == * '''name''': The name of the script. Defaults to page name. * '''desc''': A short description of what the script does. * '''author''': The script author's user name. * '''released''': When the script was first released. * '''updated''': The date of last update. Use {{tl|start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update. * '''status''': Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive. * '''source''': The source code page. * '''skins''': Supported [[WP:SKIN|skins]]. * '''browsers''': Supported [[web browser]](s). * '''github''': The script's repository on [[GitHub]], as input to the {{tlx|github}} template. * '''logo''': Image file address for logo * '''logoupright''': See [[Module:InfoboxImage]]: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%). * '''logosize''': Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used. * '''screenshot''': Image file address for screenshot * '''screenshotupright''': See logoupright. * '''screenshotsize''': See logosize. * '''screenshot-caption''': Text caption for screenshot * '''styled''': Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example above) * '''categorize''': Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia scripts]] The following parameters can aid in automatic installation: * '''mainsource''': The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script. * '''install-target''': The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js. == Templatedata == { "params": { "styled": { "label": "Styled?", "description": "Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example on template page)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "bodystyle": {}, "mainsource": { "label": "Main Source", "description": "The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "install-target": { "label": "Install Target", "description": "The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js.", "type": "string" }, "name": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the script. Defaults to page name.", "type": "string" }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "description": "Image file address for logo", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "logosize": { "label": "Logo Size", "description": "Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used.", "type": "string" }, "logoalt": { "type": "string" }, "logo-caption": {}, "screenshot": { "label": "Screenshot", "description": "Image file address for screenshot", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "screenshotsize": { "type": "string" }, "screenshotalt": { "type": "string" }, "screenshot-caption": { "label": "Screenshot Caption", "description": "Text caption for screenshot", "type": "string" }, "desc": { "label": "Description", "description": "A short description of what the script does.", "type": "string" }, "author": { "label": "Author", "description": "The script author's user name.", "type": "wiki-user-name" }, "maintainer": { "label": "Maintainer(s)", "type": "string" }, "status": { "label": "Status", "description": "Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive.", "type": "string" }, "released": { "label": "Released", "description": "When the script was first released.", "type": "date" }, "version": { "label": "Version", "description": "The version of the script.", "type": "string" }, "updated": { "label": "Updated", "description": "The date of last update. Use {{start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update.", "type": "string" }, "browsers": { "label": "Browsers", "description": "Supported web browser(s)." }, "skins": { "label": "Skins", "description": "Supported skins.", "type": "string" }, "beta": { "label": "Beta?", "description": "Marks the source as being in beta. Set to any value to enable.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "source": { "label": "Source", "description": "The source code page.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "github": { "label": "GitHub repository", "description": "The script's repository on GitHub, as input to the {{github}} template.", "type": "string" }, "logoupright": { "label": "Logo Upright", "description": "See Module:InfoboxImage: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%).", "type": "number" }, "screenshotupright": { "type": "number" }, "categorize": { "aliases": [ "cat" ], "label": "Categorize?", "description": "Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into Category:Wikipedia scripts", "type": "string", "autovalue": "no" } }, "format": "block", "description": "This infobox is intended to be used on user script description/documentation pages.", "paramOrder": [ "name", "logo", "logoupright", "logosize", "logoalt", "logo-caption", "screenshot", "screenshotsize", "screenshotalt", "screenshot-caption", "screenshotupright", "desc", "author", "maintainer", "status", "released", "version", "updated", "browsers", "skins", "beta", "source", "bodystyle", "github", "styled", "categorize", "mainsource", "install-target" ] } {{Wikipedia:User scripts/Navbox}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia scripts|*]] [[Category:User namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia user script templates]] }}

[[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} == Parameters == * '''name''': The name of the script. Defaults to page name. * '''desc''': A short description of what the script does. * '''author''': The script author's user name. * '''released''': When the script was first released. * '''updated''': The date of last update. Use {{tl|start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update. * '''status''': Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive. * '''source''': The source code page. * '''skins''': Supported [[WP:SKIN|skins]]. * '''browsers''': Supported [[web browser]](s). * '''github''': The script's repository on [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]], as input to the {{tlx|github}} template. * '''logo''': Image file address for logo * '''logoupright''': See [[Module:InfoboxImage]]: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%). * '''logosize''': Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used. * '''screenshot''': Image file address for screenshot * '''screenshotupright''': See logoupright. * '''screenshotsize''': See logosize. * '''screenshot-caption''': Text caption for screenshot * '''styled''': Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example above) * '''categorize''': Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia scripts]] The following parameters can aid in automatic installation: * '''mainsource''': The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script. * '''install-target''': The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js. == Templatedata == { "params": { "styled": { "label": "Styled?", "description": "Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example on template page)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "bodystyle": {}, "mainsource": { "label": "Main Source", "description": "The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "install-target": { "label": "Install Target", "description": "The preferred page on which the script should be included. revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == This infobox is intended to be used on [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] description/documentation pages. {{Parameter names example | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} == Full syntax == {{infobox Wikipedia user script |styled = |bodystyle = |install-target = |name = |logo = |logosize = |logoupright = |logoalt = |logo-caption = |screenshot = |screenshotsize = |screenshotupright = |screenshotalt = |screenshot-caption = |desc = |author = |maintainer = |status = |released = |version = |updated = |browsers = |skins = |source = |github = |categorize = }} == Example == {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} * Add |styled = yes for an alternate colored version (see second example): {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | status = Stable | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} == Parameters == * '''name''': The name of the script. Defaults to page name. * '''desc''': A short description of what the script does. * '''author''': The script author's user name. * '''released''': When the script was first released. * '''updated''': The date of last update. Use {{tl|start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update. * '''status''': Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive. * '''source''': The source code page. * '''skins''': Supported [[WP:SKIN|skins]]. * '''browsers''': Supported [[:en:Web browser|Web browser]](s). * '''github''': The script's repository on [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]], as input to the {{tlx|github}} template. * '''logo''': Image file address for logo * '''logoupright''': See [[Module:InfoboxImage]]: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%). * '''logosize''': Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used. * '''screenshot''': Image file address for screenshot * '''screenshotupright''': See logoupright. * '''screenshotsize''': See logosize. * '''screenshot-caption''': Text caption for screenshot * '''styled''': Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example above) * '''categorize''': Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia scripts]] The following parameters can aid in automatic installation: * '''mainsource''': The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script. * '''install-target''': The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js. == Templatedata == { "params": { "styled": { "label": "Styled?", "description": "Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example on template page)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "bodystyle": {}, "mainsource": { "label": "Main Source", "description": "The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "install-target": { "label": "Install Target", "description": "The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js.", "type": "string" }, "name": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the script. Defaults to page name.", "type": "string" }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "description": "Image file address for logo", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "logosize": { "label": "Logo Size", "description": "Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used.", "type": "string" }, "logoalt": { "type": "string" }, "logo-caption": {}, "screenshot": { "label": "Screenshot", "description": "Image file address for screenshot", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "screenshotsize": { "type": "string" }, "screenshotalt": { "type": "string" }, "screenshot-caption": { "label": "Screenshot Caption", "description": "Text caption for screenshot", "type": "string" }, "desc": { "label": "Description", "description": "A short description of what the script does.", "type": "string" }, "author": { "label": "Author", "description": "The script author's user name.", "type": "wiki-user-name" }, "maintainer": { "label": "Maintainer(s)", "type": "string" }, "status": { "label": "Status", "description": "Script's development status. Set to any value to enable.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "source": { "label": "Source", "description": "The source code page.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "github": { "label": "GitHub repository", "description": "The script's repository on GitHub, as input to the {{github}} template.", "type": "string" }, "logoupright": { "label": "Logo Upright", "description": "See Module:InfoboxImage: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%).", "type": "number" }, "screenshotupright": { "type": "number" }, "categorize": { "aliases": [ "cat" ], "label": "Categorize?", "description": "Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into Category:Wikipedia scripts", "type": "string", "autovalue": "no" } }, "format": "block", "description": "This infobox is intended to be used on user script description/documentation pages.", "paramOrder": [ "name", "logo", "logoupright", "logosize", "logoalt", "logo-caption", "screenshot", "screenshotsize", "screenshotalt", "screenshot-caption", "screenshotupright", "desc", "author", "maintainer", "status", "released", "version", "updated", "browsers", "skins", "beta", "source", "bodystyle", "github", "styled", "categorize", "mainsource", "install-target" ] } {{Wikipedia:User scripts/Navbox}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia scripts|*]] [[Category:User namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia user script templates]] }}

You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive.", "type": "string" }, "released": { "label": "Released", "description": "When the script was first released.", "type": "date" }, "version": { "label": "Version", "description": "The version of the script.", "type": "string" }, "updated": { "label": "Updated", "description": "The date of last update. Use {{start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update.", "type": "string" }, "browsers": { "label": "Browsers", "description": "Supported web browser(s)." }, "skins": { "label": "Skins", "description": "Supported skins.", "type": "string" }, "beta": { "label": "Beta?", "description": "Marks the source as being in beta. Set to any value to enable.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "source": { "label": "Source", "description": "The source code page.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "github": { "label": "GitHub repository", "description": "The script's repository on GitHub, as input to the {{github}} template.", "type": "string" }, "logoupright": { "label": "Logo Upright", "description": "See Module:InfoboxImage: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%).", "type": "number" }, "screenshotupright": { "type": "number" }, "categorize": { "aliases": [ "cat" ], "label": "Categorize?", "description": "Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into Category:Wikipedia scripts", "type": "string", "autovalue": "no" } }, "format": "block", "description": "This infobox is intended to be used on user script description/documentation pages.", "paramOrder": [ "name", "logo", "logoupright", "logosize", "logoalt", "logo-caption", "screenshot", "screenshotsize", "screenshotalt", "screenshot-caption", "screenshotupright", "desc", "author", "maintainer", "status", "released", "version", "updated", "browsers", "skins", "beta", "source", "bodystyle", "github", "styled", "categorize", "mainsource", "install-target" ] } {{Wikipedia:User scripts/Navbox}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia scripts|*]] [[Category:User namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia user script templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} == Usage == This infobox is intended to be used on [[Wikipedia:User scripts|user script]] description/documentation pages. {{Parameter names example | styled | bodystyle | install-target | name | logo | logosize | logoupright | logoalt | screenshot | screenshotsize | screenshotupright | screenshotalt | screenshot-caption | desc | author | maintainer | status | released | version | updated | browsers | skins | source | mainsource | GitHub | github | categorize | cat }} == Full syntax == {{infobox Wikipedia user script |styled = |bodystyle = |install-target = |name = |logo = |logosize = |logoupright = |logoalt = |logo-caption = |screenshot = |screenshotsize = |screenshotupright = |screenshotalt = |screenshot-caption = |desc = |author = |maintainer = |status = |released = |version = |updated = |browsers = |skins = |source = |github = |categorize = }} == Example == {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | logo = [[File:Wikimedia-logo.svg|50px]] | screenshot = [[File:Floater script screenshot.png|300px]] | screenshot-caption = MyScript in action }} * Add |styled = yes for an alternate colored version (see second example): {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | status = Stable | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} {{infobox user script | name = MyScript | desc = Does something useful | author = [[User:Username|Username]] | updated = {{start date and age|2013|03|03}} | released = {{start date and age|2008|07|07}} | status = Stable | version = 2.1.0 | source = [[User:Username/Example.js]] | skins = Vector | browsers = [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Google Chrome|Chrome]] | styled = yes }} == Parameters == * '''name''': The name of the script. Defaults to page name. * '''desc''': A short description of what the script does. * '''author''': The script author's user name. * '''released''': When the script was first released. * '''updated''': The date of last update. Use {{tl|start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update. * '''status''': Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive. * '''source''': The source code page. * '''skins''': Supported [[WP:SKIN|skins]]. * '''browsers''': Supported [[:en:Web browser|Web browser]](s). * '''github''': The script's repository on [[:en:GitHub|GitHub]], as input to the {{tlx|github}} template. * '''logo''': Image file address for logo * '''logoupright''': See [[Module:InfoboxImage]]: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%). * '''logosize''': Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used. * '''screenshot''': Image file address for screenshot * '''screenshotupright''': See logoupright. * '''screenshotsize''': See logosize. * '''screenshot-caption''': Text caption for screenshot * '''styled''': Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example above) * '''categorize''': Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into [[:Category:Wikipedia scripts]] The following parameters can aid in automatic installation: * '''mainsource''': The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script. * '''install-target''': The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js. == Templatedata == { "params": { "styled": { "label": "Styled?", "description": "Set to yes for an alternate colored version (see example on template page)", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "bodystyle": {}, "mainsource": { "label": "Main Source", "description": "The main source file, which is to be loaded from the user's custom script.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "install-target": { "label": "Install Target", "description": "The preferred page on which the script should be included. The default is common.js.", "type": "string" }, "name": { "label": "Name", "description": "The name of the script. Defaults to page name.", "type": "string" }, "logo": { "label": "Logo", "description": "Image file address for logo", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "logosize": { "label": "Logo Size", "description": "Logo size in pixels. Use of logoupright is recommended as pixels can vary in size depending on display used.", "type": "string" }, "logoalt": { "type": "string" }, "logo-caption": {}, "screenshot": { "label": "Screenshot", "description": "Image file address for screenshot", "type": "wiki-file-name" }, "screenshotsize": { "type": "string" }, "screenshotalt": { "type": "string" }, "screenshot-caption": { "label": "Screenshot Caption", "description": "Text caption for screenshot", "type": "string" }, "desc": { "label": "Description", "description": "A short description of what the script does.", "type": "string" }, "author": { "label": "Author", "description": "The script author's user name.", "type": "wiki-user-name" }, "maintainer": { "label": "Maintainer(s)", "type": "string" }, "status": { "label": "Status", "description": "Script's development status. You may describe this any way you like, such as alpha/beta/release, or stable/experimental/inactive.", "type": "string" }, "released": { "label": "Released", "description": "When the script was first released.", "type": "date" }, "version": { "label": "Version", "description": "The version of the script.", "type": "string" }, "updated": { "label": "Updated", "description": "The date of last update. Use {{start date and age}} to automatically display time since the last update.", "type": "string" }, "browsers": { "label": "Browsers", "description": "Supported web browser(s)." }, "skins": { "label": "Skins", "description": "Supported skins.", "type": "string" }, "beta": { "label": "Beta?", "description": "Marks the source as being in beta. Set to any value to enable.", "type": "string", "autovalue": "yes" }, "source": { "label": "Source", "description": "The source code page.", "type": "wiki-page-name" }, "github": { "label": "GitHub repository", "description": "The script's repository on GitHub, as input to the {{github}} template.", "type": "string" }, "logoupright": { "label": "Logo Upright", "description": "See Module:InfoboxImage: upright=yes displays image at 75% of default size, upright=value with values under 1 scaling the image down (0.9 = 90%) and values greater than 1 scaling the image up (1.15 = 115%).", "type": "number" }, "screenshotupright": { "type": "number" }, "categorize": { "aliases": [ "cat" ], "label": "Categorize?", "description": "Set to no to prevent categorizing the page into Category:Wikipedia scripts", "type": "string", "autovalue": "no" } }, "format": "block", "description": "This infobox is intended to be used on user script description/documentation pages.", "paramOrder": [ "name", "logo", "logoupright", "logosize", "logoalt", "logo-caption", "screenshot", "screenshotsize", "screenshotalt", "screenshot-caption", "screenshotupright", "desc", "author", "maintainer", "status", "released", "version", "updated", "browsers", "skins", "beta", "source", "bodystyle", "github", "styled", "categorize", "mainsource", "install-target" ] } {{Wikipedia:User scripts/Navbox}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia scripts|*]] [[Category:User namespace templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia user script templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
